name: BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Changed
notes: This building block detects account or group changes.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Changed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Computer Account Changed, Authentication.Group Changed, Authentication.Group Member Added, Authentication.Group Member Removed, Authentication.Password Change Succeeded, Authentication.Policy Change, Authentication.User Account Changed, Aut hentication.User Right Assigned, Authentication.User Right Removed
